heading: Everything your HR team needs
subheading: Four powerful AI-assisted modules that cover the complete employee lifecycle — from hire to retire.

ats.title: ATS & Recruitment
ats.description: AI-powered candidate matching, customizable Kanban pipelines, and automated screening. Track every candidate from CV to signed contract.

employees.title: Employee Management
employees.description: Central employee database with self-service portal, document management, and organizational charts. Everything in one place.

leave.title: Leave & Payroll
leave.description: Automated leave requests and approvals, Bulgarian payroll processing with NRA compliance, and real-time balance tracking.
